decks.notes: This deck aims to quickly assemble the combo pieces needed to cast Doomsday and win the game with Thassa's Oracle. It includes various cantrips and interaction spells to help find and protect the combo pieces. Cards like Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal provide fast mana to accelerate the combo, while Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student can help dig for combo pieces. The mana base is built to support the combo and includes disruptive elements like Wasteland. The deck is designed to win quickly and efficiently through a powerful combo sequence.

This deck focuses on utilizing Aether Vial to quickly put creatures into play and overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and disruptive spells. It also takes advantage of the flicker ability of Yorion, Sky Nomad to gain value from entering the battlefield effects. The deck includes a mix of control elements, like Force of Will and Swords to Plowshares, along with powerful creatures like Overlord of the Balemurk and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd to apply pressure on the opponent. The goal is to establish a strong board presence while disrupting the opponent's game plan.

The deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures and disruption spells to maintain tempo and control the game. By combining fast threats like Orcish Bowmasters and Barrowgoyf with powerful interaction like Thoughtseize, Fatal Push, and Force of Will, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while steadily building its own advantage. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides card advantage and more disruption, while cards like Daze and Wasteland further disrupt the opponent's resources. The deck's strategy revolves around applying pressure while disrupting the opponent's plans to secure a victory.

This deck focuses on using artifacts and fast mana to generate card advantage and quickly assemble powerful combos. The deck features cards like Echo of Eons and Lion's Eye Diamond to reload your hand while also generating mana for explosive plays. Defense Grid helps protect your combo from disruption, while Urza's Saga can tutor for key pieces of your strategy. With the right setup, you can unleash a devastating storm of spells or utilize powerful synergies to overwhelm your opponent and secure victory in Legacy 1 vs 1 matches.

The deck focuses on quickly assembling the necessary cards to execute the Doomsday combo win condition. Using efficient mana acceleration and disruptive elements like Thoughtseize and Force of Will, the goal is to cast Doomsday and set up a winning pile with Thassa's Oracle. The deck also includes cantrips like Brainstorm and Ponder to find combo pieces, while also including protection like Flusterstorm and Daze. The inclusion of cards like Lion's Eye Diamond and Cabal Ritual provide additional ways to generate mana for the combo, resulting in a fast and powerful strategy.

The deck focuses on controlling the game by utilizing powerful lands like Thespian's Stage, Dark Depths, and Maze of Ith to disrupt the opponent's strategy. It also includes cards like Crop Rotation and Life from the Loam to efficiently search for and recur important lands. The deck aims to slow down the opponent with Sphere of Resistance and Malevolent Rumble while generating value with cards like Urza's Saga and Exploration. Overall, the strategy revolves around using lands as both a resource and a win condition to outvalue and outlast the opponent in a grindy game.

The deck focuses on using artifacts and control elements to create a prison-like setup for the opponent. By utilizing cards like Trinisphere, Karn, the Great Creator, and Ugin, Eye of the Storms, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan and lock them out of key resources. The inclusion of powerful artifacts like The One Ring and Candelabra of Tawnos provides additional utility and threat potential. Overall, the strategy revolves around establishing a board state that is difficult for the opponent to break through, while ultimately presenting a win condition with cards like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn.

The main focus of this deck is to maintain control of the game tempo by quickly playing aggressive creatures like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Murktide Regent, while disrupting the opponent's game plan through counterspells like Daze and Force of Will. The deck aims to apply pressure early on with efficient spells like Lightning Bolt and then use cards like Ponder and Brainstorm to find key cards and maintain card advantage. Additionally, the deck utilizes lands like Wasteland to disrupt the opponent's mana base and further control the pace of the game.

The main concept of this UWx Control deck is to disrupt the opponent's game plan while setting up card advantage and powerful threats. By running a wide array of counterspells like Force of Will and Spell Pierce, removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and Prismatic Ending, and card draw/filtering spells like Brainstorm and Ponder, the deck aims to control the pace of the game. The inclusion of Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Murktide Regent provides card advantage and powerful threats to close out the game once the opponent's resources have been exhausted.

The main concept of this deck is to maintain a fast pace of aggressive gameplay by utilizing cards that enable quick spell casting and creature removal. The UR Tempo archetype focuses on controlling the tempo of the game through utilizing counterspells, card draw, and efficient creatures like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Murktide Regent. By combining aggressive creatures with disruptive spells like Daze and Force of Will, the deck aims to maintain pressure on the opponent while disrupting their strategy. Additionally, cards like Wasteland help to disrupt the opponent's mana base, further establishing control over the game.

This deck focuses on utilizing lands to control the game by disrupting opponent's mana base with cards like Wasteland and Ghost Quarter. It aims to create a lock by using cards like Thespian's Stage and Dark Depths to generate a powerful 20/20 Marit Lage token. Life from the Loam allows for recursion of key lands and Crop Rotation can fetch specific lands needed for the situation. Sphere of Resistance and Boseiju, Who Endures provide additional disruption and protection, while Exploration accelerates land drops for a faster setup. The deck is designed to grind out victories through land control and powerful late-game threats.

Utilizing a combination of disruption and aggression, this deck aims to control the tempo of the game while quickly pressuring opponents with efficient threats. By combining powerful control elements like Thoughtseize, Force of Will, and Daze with aggressive creatures like Murktide Regent and Barrowgoyf, the deck seeks to disrupt the opponent's game plan while applying consistent pressure. The inclusion of powerful planeswalkers like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student adds additional card advantage and versatility to the deck, allowing for multiple avenues to victory in a variety of matchups.

This deck focuses on utilizing cheap, efficient removal spells and disruptive counterspells to control the opponent's board while deploying threats that can quickly close out the game. The deck utilizes powerful tempo plays like Daze and Orcish Bowmasters to keep the opponent off balance while generating card advantage with cards like Brainstorm and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student. Murktide Regent and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares provide powerful finishers that can quickly end the game. The mana base is built around efficient fetch lands and dual lands to ensure smooth mana development throughout the game.

This deck focuses on utilizing disruptive spells like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push to control the opponent's board while quickly establishing a strong presence with efficient creatures like Baleful Strix and Barrowgoyf. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides card advantage and tempo advantage, while cards like Flow State and Drown in the Loch help maintain the deck's tempo advantage. The inclusion of powerful planeswalkers like Kaito, Bane of Nightmares adds another dimension to the deck's strategy, allowing for versatility and flexibility in playstyle. This deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while quickly closing out the game with its aggressive creatures.

This deck focuses on locking down the opponent's resources through a combination of artifacts and planeswalkers, ultimately controlling the game until the player can overwhelm their opponent with powerful threats such as Emrakul, the Aeons Torn or Ugin, the Eye of the Storms. The key strategy involves using cards like Trinisphere and Planar Nexus to slow down the opponent's game plan while utilizing powerful artifacts like Urza's Tower and Grim Monolith to generate mana efficiently for big plays. The inclusion of Karn, the Great Creator and Pithing Needle further disrupts the opponent's strategy, making this deck a formidable control prison archetype in Legacy 1 vs 1 format.

The deck focuses on utilizing cheap and efficient spells to control the board while putting pressure on the opponent with aggressive creatures like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Murktide Regent. It aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan with counterspells like Daze and Force of Will, while also maintaining card advantage with cantrips like Preordain and Ponder. The mana base is designed to support the deck's tempo strategy, with a mix of fetch lands, dual lands, and utility lands like Wasteland. Overall, the deck seeks to quickly establish dominance on the battlefield and close out the game before the opponent can stabilize.
